PluginData.Author: lolifamily
PluginData.Tooltip: True HDR output: fp16 scRGB swapchain, BT.2390 tonemapping, emissive particle boost, EXR screenshots
PluginData.Description: Adds a true HDR output path to Space Engineers 2 (DX12). The swapchain becomes flip-model R16G16B16A16_Float with scRGB color space. The engine's SDR tonemapping is replaced by a BT.2390 EETF curve (PQ space) that preserves highlight detail beyond SDR white, with configurable peak, paper-white, source peak, and black lift. The UI is drawn on a separate layer and composited at your paper-white brightness, so SDR menus and HUD read correctly on an HDR display. Emissive GPU particles (thrusters, lasers, muzzle flashes, explosions) can be boosted by a configurable factor with live preview; diffuse smoke and dust are untouched. Screenshots are also exported as OpenEXR (HDR) beside the game's normal SDR image. Luminance only, Rec.709 primaries; no wide-gamut remap. Auto-disables itself if it crashes during init, with a config flag to re-enable. Requires Windows HDR enabled and a supported display; can be force-enabled on SDR displays.
